title: Kaupenjoe's All-Consuming Grey Goo
description: A mod that adds the incredibly dangerous Grey Goo Substance, likely to consume entire worlds!
body:
WARNING: IF YOU'RE NOT CAREFUL WITH THIS MOD IT MIGHT DESTROY YOUR WORLD. CAUTION IS ADVISED! 

# Origins of the Grey Goo
_The Grey Goo came to us via a meteorite. It consumes all material, organic and inorganic expect for ferrous metals, like iron or some of its alloys. A containment breach of the Grey Goo would be a disaster on a scale not before seen! Collapse of the entire world as we know it. Researches have been able to isolate the Grey Goo isotopes and created new forms of Grey Goo. Beware though, the power of the Gods is our hands and if it is misused or gets into the wrong hands... Nothing shall remain!_

# Features of the Mod
The Mod adds a couple of Creative-Mode only blocks: Grey Goo, Dark Grey Goo, Purple Goo and Pink Goo. More types of Goo might be added in the future! NOTE: The goo blocks are extremely fast in devouring the world and slowing down the game, caution is advised and you're using this mod at your own risk! 


# Custom Game Rules
**IMPORTANT** - By default the Spread Chance of the Goo is heavily reduced. You can also turn the goo spreading on and off:

/gamerule gooSpread true
Will turn on Goo Spreading

/gamerule gooSpread false
Will turn off Goo Spreading

/gamerule gooSpreadChance 50
This is the default spread chance of the Goo. Higher numbers are SLOWER! 

/gamerule gooSpreadChance 5
This is the MAX spread chance speed of the Goo. Highly advised to use higher numbers first for testing. 

# Additional Note

Once again, this mod should **NEVER** be used in a Survival World or a Creative Building World. If you add this to your Server or your world and it destroys the world, or crashed the Server, **it is your fault**! Do not play around with this lightly!
